name: Ultima-Claw UI Prime (Cognitive Control Center)
description: The definitive interface for Ultima-Claw memory systems. Visualizes cognitive consolidation, identity drift, and context budgeting with high-fidelity editorial design.

CRI.target_users: Power users and AI orchestrators requiring deep cognitive transparency
CRI.business_outcome: Zero-friction management of multi-engine LLM identities and long-term memory
CRI.kill_switch: Identity consensus failure or critical memory corruption

acceptance_criteria: AC-COGNITION-01: Real-time visualization of the 5 memory stages (Encoding to Identity-Filtered Recall)
AC-IDENTITY-01: Visual indicator of 'Identity Drift' per engine (Claude vs Gemini vs Codex)
AC-BUDGET-01: Dynamic context budgeter showing Hot/Warm/Cold tier distribution
AC-UX-01: Editorial-grade aesthetics with smooth transitions and high-density information display
